hero.name: JULIAN SOTO
hero.title: SOFTWARE_ENGINEER
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
hero.bio: Architecting production-grade digital systems and shipping AI-powered applications across the stack. I build with Next.js, React, TypeScript, custom WordPress pipelines with PHP 8, and full-stack ML tools with Python, FastAPI, PyTorch & TensorFlow. Zero downtime. Zero excuses.

lines.label: BIO
lines.value: I don't just build websites — I ship battle-tested, type-safe systems that crush complex business logic. From CMS stacks to neural-network-powered audio pipelines, I architect scalable solutions with Next.js, React, TypeScript, PHP 8, Python, FastAPI, PyTorch & TensorFlow.

lines.label: STACK
lines.value: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PHP 8, WordPress, Python, FastAPI, PyTorch, TensorFlow

items.title: DUMU_AI_EXTRACTION
items.description: Full-stack AI app that rips bass lines from any audio file using Meta AI's Demucs neural network for source separation and Spotify's Basic Pitch for audio-to-MIDI conversion. Features BPM detection, real-time progress pipeline, drag & drop upload, and one-click MIDI download.

items.title: BITROVA_TASKS
items.description: Feature-rich task management app with Supabase auth & cloud sync. Ships with recurring tasks, glassmorphism UI, file attachments, subtasks, drag & drop, undo/redo and Lottie animations. Cross-platform iOS/Android/Web deployment.

items.title: BASS_ACADEMY
items.description: Interactive music training app built with React 19 and the Web Audio API. Features real-time audio synthesis, dynamic exercise generation engine, and responsive tablature visualization. Pure frontend architecture — zero backend dependency.

items.title: NEXUSSHOP_ECOMMERCE
items.description: Headless E-commerce solution with secure Stripe/MercadoPago payment integration, dynamic inventory management via MongoDB, and SSR performance optimizations. Production-grade checkout flow.

items.title: SOUL_SOLUTIONS
items.description: Professional landing page for mainframe modernization consulting. Demonstrates legacy COBOL/Db2 migration expertise, system design capabilities, and enterprise-grade architecture patterns.

items.title: FORMA_REAL_CMS
items.description: Fitness community forum powered by custom WordPress architecture. OOP plugin with bespoke MySQL tables, real-time notification system, advanced moderation engine, full-text search, and modern UI with micro-animations.

items.title: Modern Frontend Architecture
items.description: Building cutting-edge, responsive UIs with React 19 and Next.js. Component-driven architecture, server components, and pixel-perfect implementations that ship fast.

items.title: Scalable Backend & API Design
items.description: Engineering robust server-side solutions with Node.js, PHP 8, and Next.js API routes. RESTful APIs, auth systems, and middleware pipelines built for scale.

items.title: Data Strategy & Modeling
items.description: Designing efficient database schemas with MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL & Supabase. Query optimization and data integrity for high-throughput production environments.

items.title: End-to-End Product Engineering
items.description: Shipping complete web apps from concept to deployment. Seamless integration of frontend, backend, and legacy systems for optimal DX and performance.

items.title: CMS & WordPress Development
items.description: Custom plugin dev with OOP architecture, tailored themes, and enterprise WordPress solutions. Bespoke MySQL tables, moderation systems, and real-time notifications.

items.title: AI & Audio Processing
items.description: Full-stack AI-powered apps for audio analysis and transformation. Python, FastAPI, PyTorch & TensorFlow — neural source separation (Meta AI Demucs) and audio-to-MIDI conversion (Spotify Basic Pitch). Containerized cloud deployments.

events.title: Senior Software Engineer
events.description: Bridging legacy COBOL/Db2 systems with modern cloud architectures. Shipping production code with Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and RESTful APIs for enterprise clients.

events.title: Full Stack Specialization
events.description: MERN Stack and System Architecture. Advanced training in scalable application design, design patterns, and battle-tested best practices.

events.title: Computer Science Degree
events.description: Currently pursuing a CS degree — diving deep into algorithms, data structures, and the theoretical foundations of computation.

events.title: Secondary Education
events.description: Completed secondary education with a focus on economics and business fundamentals. Where the journey began.

contact.establish_description: Ready to architect your next digital system? Send a message to initiate the handshake protocol. I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to ship something great together.
